title: A Difficult Conversation at Immigration
content: After a long international flight, Daniel finally arrived at immigration control. When the officer reviewed his documents, several additional questions followed regarding his travel plans and accommodation. Daniel felt slightly nervous, especially because he was tired from the journey. He answered calmly and provided hotel confirmations and return flight information when requested. Although the conversation lasted only a few minutes, it felt much longer. Eventually, the officer returned his passport, welcomed him to the country, and wished him an enjoyable stay. Daniel continued toward baggage claim feeling relieved and ready to begin his trip.
